response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive full-stack experience with a strong emphasis on modern TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud-native development, directly matching the role's primary stack. His recent work in AI-agent infrastructure and scalable systems, combined with a proven track record of shipping high-impact features and optimizing performance, demonstrates both technical depth and breadth. His entrepreneurial background and open-source contributions further highlight his ability to own end-to-end solutions.
strengths: Deep expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React with recent full-stack projects
Proven ability to scale systems (e.g., handling millions of events/HTTP requests) and optimize performance
Strong AI-agent development experience and modern cloud-native practices (Kubernetes, AWS CDK)
concerns: Limited Kotlin/Java experience in recent roles (though listed in skills)
No direct mention of Vitest (though Jest is listed), which is a core stack requirement
Slightly shorter tenure in most recent roles (e.g., 4 months at re:cinq, 3 years at Optilyz)

key_factors.factor: AI-agent infrastructure and scalable systems experience
